'''âv-h-k''' ('''kavahak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphadenectomize|lymphadenectomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphadenectomize|lymphadenectomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-h-k
|-
! Lemma
| kavahak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivahak|thivahak]] || [[word:jivahak|jivahak]] || [[word:shivahak|shivahak]] || [[word:kivahak|kivahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvahak|thuthuvahak]] || [[word:jujuvahak|jujuvahak]] || [[word:shushuvahak|shushuvahak]] || [[word:kukuvahak|kukuvahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvahak|thuvahak]] || [[word:juvahak|juvahak]] || [[word:shuvahak|shuvahak]] || [[word:kuvahak|kuvahak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvahak|thuvahak]] || [[word:juvahak|juvahak]] || [[word:shuvahak|shuvahak]] || [[word:kuvahak|kuvahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevahak|thevahak]] || [[word:jevahak|jevahak]] || [[word:shevahak|shevahak]] || [[word:kevahak|kevahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovahak|thothovahak]] || [[word:jojovahak|jojovahak]] || [[word:shoshovahak|shoshovahak]] || [[word:kokovahak|kokovahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovahak|thovahak]] || [[word:jovahak|jovahak]] || [[word:shovahak|shovahak]] || [[word:kovahak|kovahak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovahak|thovahak]] || [[word:jovahak|jovahak]] || [[word:shovahak|shovahak]] || [[word:kovahak|kovahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvahak|thĂŠvahak]] || [[word:jĂŠvahak|jĂŠvahak]] || [[word:shĂŠvahak|shĂŠvahak]] || [[word:kĂŠvahak|kĂŠvahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavahak|thathavahak]] || [[word:jajavahak|jajavahak]] || [[word:shashavahak|shashavahak]] || [[word:kakavahak|kakavahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavahak|thavahak]] || [[word:javahak|javahak]] || [[word:shavahak|shavahak]] || [[word:kavahak|kavahak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavahak|thavahak]] || [[word:javahak|javahak]] || [[word:shavahak|shavahak]] || [[word:kavahak|kavahak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavahak|shavahak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavahak|goshavahak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavahak|gokishavahak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavahaknĂŒ|shavahaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavahaknknĂŒ|goshavahaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahaknĂŒ|gokishavahaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavahakshĂ«|shavahakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavahaknkshĂ«|goshavahaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavahakshĂ«|gokishavahakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahakro|shavahakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahaknkro|goshavahaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahakro|gokishavahakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahakmu|shavahakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahaknkmu|goshavahaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahakmu|gokishavahakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavahaksher|shavahaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavahaknksher|goshavahaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavahaksher|gokishavahaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavahakng|shavahakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavahaknkng|goshavahaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavahakng|gokishavahakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavahakya|shavahakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavahaknkya|goshavahaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavahakya|gokishavahakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavahakyam|shavahakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavahaknkyam|goshavahaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavahakyam|gokishavahakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavahaknĂŒshĂ«|shavahaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavahaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshavahaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavahaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishavahaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahaknĂŒro|shavahaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahaknknĂŒro|goshavahaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahaknĂŒro|gokishavahaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahaknĂŒmu|shavahaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahaknknĂŒmu|goshavahaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahaknĂŒmu|gokishavahaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavahakshĂ«nĂŒ|shavahakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavahaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavahaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavahakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahakshĂ«ro|shavahakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahaknkshĂ«ro|goshavahaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahakshĂ«ro|gokishavahakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahakshĂ«mu|shavahakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahaknkshĂ«mu|goshavahaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahakshĂ«mu|gokishavahakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavahakronĂŒ|shavahakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavahaknkronĂŒ|goshavahaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahakronĂŒ|gokishavahakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavahakroshĂ«|shavahakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavahaknkroshĂ«|goshavahaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavahakroshĂ«|gokishavahakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavahakromu|shavahakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavahaknkromu|goshavahaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavahakromu|gokishavahakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavahakmunĂŒ|shavahakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavahaknkmunĂŒ|goshavahaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavahakmunĂŒ|gokishavahakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavahakmushĂ«|shavahakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavahaknkmushĂ«|goshavahaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavahakmushĂ«|gokishavahakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavahakmuro|shavahakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavahaknkmuro|goshavahaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavahakmuro|gokishavahakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
